challenge.line1: You don't have to believe this.
challenge.line2: Plant seeds for what you want.
challenge.line3: And finally understand how life really works.

notifications.title: Allow notifications?
notifications.body: Get gentle daily reminders to meditate, protect your streak, and come back to the seeds you planted.

legal.prefix: By continuing, you agree to our

initialMessages.guidedWelcome:
Welcome to SeedMind ☕

I'm here to help you understand how the seeds you plant in life shape your reality.
initialMessages.directWelcome:
Hey there! ☕️

Tell me any problem or goal you have.
I’ll answer through the seeds lens, with practical next steps. 🌱✨

modeSelection.title: What brings you here today?
modeSelection.problemSubtitle: I need support with a challenge

modeOpeners.problem: What's been weighing on you lately? Share what you're going through, and together we'll explore what might be at play.
modeOpeners.goal: That's exciting! ✨ Tell me about your goal – what do you want to achieve? The more specific, the better I can help you plant the right seeds.

starters.career: I feel stuck in my career
starters.competition: I want to win a competition
starters.soulmate: I want to find my soulmate
starters.moreMoney: I want to make more money
starters.exams: I want to ace my exams
starters.business: I want to start my business

actions.sendFirstBody: Send one message first so I can tailor your seeds and meditation to this journey. Then these buttons unlock. 🌱
actions.sendFirstHint: Send one message to unlock these actions. 🌱

help.buttons: You’ll find Plant Seeds 🌱 and Meditate ☕ under the chat. If they’re greyed out, send one message first. Long-press a message to select and copy text, like in other apps.
help.plantSeeds: To plant seeds: tap Plant Seeds 🌱 under the chat, write the kind actions you already did, then save. They’ll show up in your Garden.
help.meditate: To do a coffee meditation: tap the Meditations ☕ tab at the bottom, then choose a meditation. (You can also tap Meditate ☕ under the chat.)
help.waterSeeds:
Watering seeds = doing a ☕ coffee meditation. The name is a metaphor: you visualize someone you helped, feel their happiness as vividly as the pleasure of sipping a warm drink — not about actually drinking coffee (that’s optional).

Think of it as a powerful way to speed up your seeds’ growth: it’s a catalyst for seeds you’ve already planted, helping your reality shift faster.

Many people like to do this when they’re calm — often right before sleep — but you can use it at other quiet moments too.

After it ends, you’ll choose which seeds you watered.

Coffee meditation = remember a kind act you did, feel the other person’s joy as your own, and dedicate that goodness to your goal, your karmic partner’s goal, and the wellbeing of all living beings.
help.garden: To view journeys: open the My Garden tab. Tap a journey to see its seeds. Use the 3 dots (⋯) on a journey to rename or delete it.
help.newJourney: To start a new journey: tap the + in the top-right to create a new conversation.

gardenTicket.confirmBody:
This will use 1 Garden Journey to enable planting in this conversation.

You will have {{remaining}} left in this cycle.

logSeeds.title: What Seeds Did You Plant? 🌱
logSeeds.subtitle: Describe the kind acts you did today or before. Who did you help? What did you do?
logSeeds.placeholder: e.g., I bought coffee for a colleague who was having a hard day...
logSeeds.readyToWater: {{count}} seed(s) planted today! Ready to water them?

phases.reciprocalLaw: To get what you want, help others get it first

harvested.message: This journey has been harvested! Share any updates or start a new journey for new goals.

topicChangePrompt.title: It sounds like you might be dealing with something new.

alerts.harvestedMessage:
You've harvested the seeds from this journey!

To plant new seeds, tap the "+" button to start a fresh journey.
alerts.deleteConvoMessage: Delete this conversation? Your seeds will stay safe in your garden—only the chat history will be removed.
alerts.saveError: Could not save your seeds. Please try again.

system.directSeedsSaved_one:
🌱 {{count}} seed planted in your garden!

Head to the ☕ Meditations tab to water your seeds — it’s a powerful way to speed up your seeds’ growth. “Coffee meditation” is a metaphor: you visualize who you helped, feel their happiness like the comfort of a warm drink, and dedicate that good. It acts as a catalyst for seeds you’ve already planted. Coffee is optional; being calm helps — many people do this before sleep.
system.directSeedsSaved_other:
🌱 {{count}} seeds planted in your garden!

Head to the ☕ Meditations tab to water your seeds — it’s a powerful way to speed up your seeds’ growth. “Coffee meditation” is a metaphor: you visualize who you helped, feel their happiness like the comfort of a warm drink, and dedicate that good. It acts as a catalyst for seeds you’ve already planted. Coffee is optional; being calm helps — many people do this before sleep.
system.guidedSeedsSaved_one:
Perfect! I've saved your {{count}} seed. 🌱

Now head to your meditation: "{{meditationTitle}}"

When you're done, come back here and I'll celebrate your growth with you. ☕✨
system.guidedSeedsSaved_other:
Perfect! I've saved your {{count}} seeds. 🌱

Now head to your meditation: "{{meditationTitle}}"

When you're done, come back here and I'll celebrate your growth with you. ☕✨

meditationCompleted.footer:
This is how you change your reality — one seed at a time, one day at a time.

The more you plant, the faster things shift. Keep going! 🌱☕
meditationCompleted.zeroPlanted: Beautiful. You watered {{watered}} seeds with your meditation today. ✨
meditationCompleted.oneOne: Beautiful. You planted one seed today and watered it with your meditation. ✨
meditationCompleted.oneMany: Beautiful. You planted one seed today and watered {{watered}} seeds with your meditation. ✨
meditationCompleted.manyOne: Beautiful. You planted {{planted}} seeds today and watered one seed with your meditation. ✨
meditationCompleted.manyMany: Beautiful. You planted {{planted}} seeds today and watered {{watered}} seeds with your meditation. ✨

growthHint.title: Want to speed up growth?
growthHint.body: Seeds grow on their own over time, but coffee meditation speeds them up. If you want to reach “Sprout” sooner — water your seeds with meditation.

growthCongrats.title: ✨ {{stageName}}: +{{count}}
growthCongrats.body: {{countText}} reached “{{stageName}}”. Your reality is already starting to shift — keep doing coffee meditations to amplify that momentum.
growthCongrats.bodyHarvested: {{countText}} reached “Harvest”. This has already grown into your reality. Water your other seeds with coffee meditation so they can reach harvest too.

growthLegend.title: Growth Stages
growthLegend.hint: Meditations help your seeds grow faster.

streakTooltip.keepGoing: Keep meditating daily to grow your streak!

player.wateringNoteBody:
Watering seeds = completing a coffee meditation.

After the meditation you’ll be asked which seeds you watered. Don’t exit early — otherwise your progress won’t be saved.
player.completionSeedsWateredBody: You watered {{count}} seed(s). They're growing stronger!
player.completionNoWateringBody: Come back anytime to do a coffee meditation and water your seeds.
player.previewBody: This practice works best when you have seeds to water. Plant some seeds first, then meditate on them to help them grow.
player.previewHint: 💡 Think of it like a garden — you need seeds first!
player.audioComingSoonBody: This meditation audio is being prepared. You can still complete your meditation and water your seeds!

badges.tapToStart: Tap to start your meditation and water your seeds ☕

banner.seedsSaved: 🌱 Your seeds are saved! Complete your meditation below, then return to the chat for your celebration.

quote.text:
The seeds you plant today determine
the garden you walk through tomorrow.

tips.pastSeeds: No new seeds today? That's okay! Meditate on any past kindness—even from years ago. Every meditation helps those seeds grow.

1.title: Planting Seeds of Abundance
1.subtitle: For Financial Wellbeing
1.description: Discover how small acts of generosity today create ripples of prosperity in your tomorrow. Like a coffee bean that transforms into a rich brew, your kind actions transform into abundance.

2.title: The Mirror of Love
2.subtitle: For Relationships
2.description: See how the love you give reflects back to you. When you water the seeds of compassion, beautiful relationships bloom in the garden of your life.

3.title: Seeds of Vitality
3.subtitle: For Health & Energy
3.description: Your body is a garden. Learn how caring for others plants seeds of wellness that blossom into vibrant health and boundless energy.

4.title: Daily Gratitude Brew
4.subtitle: Daily Reflection
4.description: Like savoring the last sip of your favorite coffee, this meditation helps you appreciate the seeds you planted today and prepare for tomorrow's harvest.

5.title: Clarity Through Giving
5.subtitle: For Mental Clarity
5.description: When the mind feels clouded, remember: helping others find their way clears the fog in your own path. Plant seeds of guidance, harvest clarity.

6.title: The Coffee Shop of the Soul
6.subtitle: Finding Inner Peace
6.description: Imagine a cozy corner in the coffee shop of your soul. Here, you learn how each act of kindness is like a warm cup that fills your heart with peace.

streak.title: Streak
streak.tooltipText1: Your streak tracks consecutive days you've completed a coffee meditation.
streak.tooltipText2: Even meditating on past seeds counts! Miss a day and it resets, but don't worry—your garden, seeds, and all your progress stay forever. 🌱

seedSelection.title: Which seeds did you water?
seedSelection.subtitle: Select only the seeds you actually visualized during your meditation.
seedSelection.emptyBody: Plant some seeds in chat first, then come back here to water them with meditation.

common.comingSoonBody: This feature will be available once the app is published.

reminders.title: 🔔 Daily Reminders
reminders.description: For planting seeds and watering your garden

journey.description: Your progress stays forever—streaks are just motivation!

support.description: Get help or learn more about SeedMind
support.howItWorksBody:
SeedMind is based on the principle that our actions create our reality—like planting seeds that grow into the experiences we harvest.

1️⃣ Share what's on your mind
2️⃣ Discover the mirror principle
3️⃣ Plant seeds of kindness in daily life
4️⃣ Water your seeds with meditation
5️⃣ Watch your reality transform

The more you give, the more comes back to you. It's that simple!
support.faqBody:
🤔 What are "seeds"?
Seeds are the thoughts, words and actions you make every moment. They plant the future you live—and become the harvest you receive.

☕ Do I need coffee to meditate?
No! The "coffee" is just a cozy metaphor. Meditate however feels right to you.

📋 Can I copy chat text?
Yes. Long-press a message in Seeds Guide to highlight and copy, like in other apps.

🔥 What if I miss a day?
Your streak resets, but your progress never disappears. Every seed you've planted still counts!

🌿 How do seeds grow?
When you meditate on a seed, you "water" it. Each meditation strengthens your seeds—keep watering and trust the process!

share.description: Help others discover the power of seeds
share.shareMessage: 🌱 I've been using SeedMind to cultivate positive changes in my life through kindness and meditation. Check it out!

data.appleRelayHint: This is an Apple relay email (“Hide My Email”) that forwards to your Apple ID inbox.
data.signOutBody: You’ll be returned to the Start screen. You can sign in again anytime.
data.deleteAccountBody:
This permanently deletes your SeedMind account and clears your cloud data.

This can’t be undone.
data.deleteAccountSuccessBody: Your account and data have been deleted.
data.deleteAccountErrorBody: Please try again in a moment.
data.deleteAccountReauthBody:
For security, Apple requires a recent sign-in before deleting an account.

Please sign in again, then return to Settings and delete your account.
data.deleteAccountNotSignedInBody: Please sign in first, then you can delete your account from Settings.
data.replayOnboardingBody: Would you like to see the welcome introduction again? The app will restart to show the onboarding.
data.replayOnboardingSuccessBody: You can now replay the onboarding from the Start screen.
data.clearChatBody: This will delete all your conversations. Your seeds, meditation history, and streaks will stay safe.
data.clearChatSuccessBody: Your conversation history has been cleared.
data.resetAllBody: This will delete all your seeds, meditation history, streaks, AND conversations. This cannot be undone.
data.resetAllSuccessBody: All your data has been cleared.
data.clearHint: Remove all seeds, history, and settings
data.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete all your seeds, meditation history, and settings. This action cannot be undone.

about.title: ℹ️ About SeedMind
about.body: SeedMind helps you cultivate positive changes in your life through the power of kind actions and mindful meditation.

paywall.title: SeedMind Premium
paywall.heroBody: Premium removes limits and unlocks the full meditation library.
paywall.freeIncludes: Free includes: {{messages}} messages / {{days}} days · {{journeys}} Garden Journeys / {{days}} days · {{daily}} only

benefits.messagesPerCycle: Up to 1000 messages per billing cycle

benefitsActive.messagesPerCycle: Up to 1000 messages per billing cycle

paywall.noPlans: Plans aren’t available yet. This usually means the RevenueCat Offering isn’t set as “current”, or products aren’t approved/imported.

plans.monthlyHint: Unlimited journeys, full meditations, more messages
plans.yearlyHint: Unlimited journeys, all meditations, more messages

compliance.termFallback: {{term}}. Price is shown before you confirm in Apple’s payment sheet and in subscription settings.

paywall.disclaimer: Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
paywall.cancelNote: If you cancel, you keep Premium access until the end of your current billing period.
paywall.sandboxNote: TestFlight uses Apple’s sandbox, so subscription periods can appear shorter than real monthly/yearly plans.

alerts.confirmAccountBody:

Premium will be linked to this SeedMind account and won’t transfer to other accounts.

alerts.notAvailableBody: Please try again in a moment.
alerts.purchaseCompletedBody: Your purchase went through, but Premium isn’t active yet. It should sync in a few seconds.
alerts.purchaseCompletedBodyWithEntitlement: Your purchase went through, but the entitlement (“{{entitlement}}”) isn’t active yet. It should sync in a few seconds.
